mapper.sql: id, title, content, enabled, pinned, publish_time, created_by, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM announcement WHERE enabled = 1 AND (publish_time IS NULL OR publish_time <= NOW()) ORDER BY pinned DESC, publish_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM announcement ORDER BY pinned DESC, publish_time DESC, id DESC
SELECT FROM announcement ORDER BY pinned DESC, publish_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT FROM announcement WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO announcement (title, content, enabled, pinned, publish_time, created_by) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{enabled}, #{pinned}, #{publishTime}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE announcement SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, enabled = #{enabled}, pinned = #{pinned}, publish_time = #{publishTime} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE announcement SET enabled = #{enabled} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE announcement SET pinned = #{pinned} WHERE id = #{id}
